name: database-migrations
description: Evaluations for database-migrations skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-schema-changes
evals.description: Skill should trigger on database schema change requests

prompts.input: Add a new column avatar_url to the users table
prompts.reason: Adding a column to a table requires a migration

prompts.input: Create a migration to add an index on the email column without downtime
prompts.reason: Index creation migration with zero-downtime requirement

prompts.input: I need to rename the username column to display_name safely in production
prompts.reason: Column rename in production requires careful migration strategy

prompts.input: Write a Prisma migration to add the orders table with foreign key to users
prompts.reason: ORM migration for new table creation

prompts.input: How do I backfill existing rows after adding a new column?
prompts.reason: Data backfill is a key migration use case covered by the skill

evals.name: trigger-negative-general-db
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for general database queries or non-migration tasks

prompts.input: Write a SQL query to get all users ordered by created_at
prompts.reason: Read query, not a schema migration task

prompts.input: How does a LEFT JOIN work?
prompts.reason: SQL concept question, not migration related

prompts.input: Optimize this slow SELECT query on the orders table
prompts.reason: Query optimization, not a migration task
